name: Foolproof Tart Dough
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Cold heavy cream or Whipping cream
recipeInstructions: This recipe can be used for pies, tarts, cheesecake, or quiche. It makes a nice flaky shell. Combine 1 cup of flour with a little salt and 1 tsp sugar in a bowl. Cut in one stick of cold butter on top. If the kitchen temperature is high, chill the flour and bowl mixture in the freezer for up to 1 hour. Add 6 tablespoons of cold heavy cream (or whipping cream) and process until a dough forms. Turn out onto a floured board or counter and roll into shape. Use plenty of flour when rolling and brush off excess if uncertain.
